memoryArtifacts.headline: 1697: Waitstill Webber & Meribah Hutchins group sheet with sources
memoryArtifacts.description:
(Samuel Webber v. George Burroughs ) 
George Burroughs Executed August 19, 1692

"Samuel Webber aged about 36 years Testifieth and sayth that 
aboute seaven or eight Yeares agoe I Lived at Casco Bay and George Burroughs was then Minester there, and haveing heard much of the 
great strength of him s'd Burroughs ; he Coming to our house wee 
ware in discourse about the same and he then told mee that he had 
put his fingers into the Bung of a Barrell of Malasses and lifted it 
up, and carryed it Round him and sett it downe againe. 

Salem August 2'd 1692."   

George Burroughs was the subject in Arthur Miller's "The Crucible."

zh.lifeSummary: 當Deborah Littlefield於1663年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼威爾斯時，她的父親John Littlefield39歲，母親Patience Wakefield36歲。她於1680年8月與Samuel Webber在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1740年5月20日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Deborah Littlefield于1663年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼威爾斯时，她的父亲John Littlefield39岁，母亲Patience Wakefield36岁。她于1680年8月与Samuel Webber在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1740年5月20日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Littlefield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Littlefield Green in White Waltham, Berkshire. The placename derives from Old English lȳtel ‘little’ + feld ‘open country’.

nameMeanings.name: Deborah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Deborah Littlefield was born in 1663, in Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, John Littlefield, was 39 and her mother, Patience Wakefield, was 36. She married Samuel Webber in August 1680, in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 20 May 1740, in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 77.

ja.lifeSummary: Deborah Littlefieldが1663年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウエルズで生まれた時，父John Littlefieldは39歳，母Patience Wakefieldは36歳であった。1680年8月にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークヨークでSamuel Webberと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1740年5月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークヨークで77歳で死去した。

ko.Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 웰스

ko.lifeSummary: Deborah Littlefield(이)가 1663년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 웰스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Littlefield(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Patience Wakefield(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1680년 8월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 요르크에서 Samuel Webber(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1740년 5월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 요르크에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Samuel Webber em agosto de 1680, em York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Deborah Littlefield родилась в 1663 г. в местности веллс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Littlefield было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Patience Wakefield, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Samuel Webber август 1680 г. в местности ерк, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 20 мая 1740 г. в местности ерк, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Deborah Littlefield nació en 1663, en Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, John Littlefield, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Patience Wakefield, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Samuel Webber en agosto de 1680, en York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 20 de mayo de 1740, en York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 77 años.
